caption: A man with dark curly hair and glasses, wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and striped tie, speaks into a handheld microphone in a crowded indoor setting. He is positioned centrally, gesturing with his left hand as he talks. Behind and beside him, other attendees are seated; a woman with blonde hair and glasses wears a white jacket and a name tag, and another woman in a dark blazer sits further back. A silver laptop with a visible white Apple logo rests on a table in front of the woman in the white jacket. As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak, shifting his facial expression and hand movements, eventually bringing his left hand toward his chest. The surrounding people remain relatively still, observing the speaker in the dimly lit room.
